zh.lifeSummary: 當Susanna Brounker於大約1549年出生在英國維爾爾梅爾可善姆時，她的父親Henry Brounker40歲，母親Lady Ursula Ann Yates35歲。她於大約1565年與Robert Halswell在英國結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1596年3月27日在英國薩默塞特格阿瑟爾斯特享年48歲，埋葬在英國薩默塞特格阿瑟爾斯特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Susanna Brounker于大约1549年出生在英国維爾爾梅爾可善姆时，她的父亲Henry Brounker40岁，母亲Lady Ursula Ann Yates35岁。她于大约1565年与Robert Halswell在英国结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1596年3月27日在英国薩默塞特格阿瑟爾斯特享年48岁，埋葬在英国薩默塞特格阿瑟爾斯特。

nameMeanings.name: Brounker
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German (Rhineland-Palatinate; mainly Brünker): habitational name for someone from Brunken in Rhineland-Palatinate.

variants.name: Brunger
meanings: German (Brünger): from the ancient Germanic personal name Brunger meaning ‘brown or shining spear’.
English (Kent): from the Middle English personal name Brunger (Old English Brūngār, with the same etymology as its ancient Germanic cognate Brunger in 1 above).
Altered form of Swiss German Brüngger: habitational name denoting someone from Brünggen in Switzerland.

variants.name: Branker
meanings: English (Wiltshire and Kent; also common in the West Indies): perhaps a variant of   Brunker   (see   Brunger  ).

nameMeanings.name: Susanna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament form (Luke 8:3) of the Hebrew name Shoshana (from shoshan ‘lily’, which in modern Hebrew also means ‘rose’).

variants.name: Suzannah
meanings: New Testament form (Luke 8:3) of the Hebrew name Shoshana (from shoshan ‘lily’, which in modern Hebrew also means ‘rose’).

variants.name: Suzanna
meanings: New Testament form (Luke 8:3) of the Hebrew name Shoshana (from shoshan ‘lily’, which in modern Hebrew also means ‘rose’).

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Susanna Brounker was born about 1549, in Melksham, Wiltshire, England, her father, Henry Brounker, was 40 and her mother, Lady Ursula Ann Yates, was 35. She married Robert Halswell about 1565, in England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 27 March 1596, in Goathurst, Somerset, England, at the age of 48, and was buried in Goathurst, Somerset, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Susanna Brounker est née environ 1549, à Melksham, Wiltshire, Angleterre, son père, Henry Brounker, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Lady Ursula Ann Yates, avait 35 ans. Elle a épousé Robert Halswell environ 1565, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 27 mars 1596, à Goathurst, Somerset, Angleterre, à l’âge de 48 ans, et a été enterrée à Goathurst, Somerset, Angleterre.

de.Orchard Portman, Somerset, England: Orchard Portman, Somerset, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Susanna Brounker um 1549 in Melksham, Wiltshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Henry Brounker 40 und ihre Mutter Lady Ursula Ann Yates 35. Sie hat um 1565 in England Robert Halswell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 27. März 1596 im Alter von 48 Jahren in Goathurst, Somerset, England und wurde in Goathurst, Somerset, England begraben.

Lei sposato Robert Halswell circa 1565, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Susanna Brounkerが約1549年にイギリスウィルトシュアイアメルクシャムで生まれた時，父Henry Brounkerは40歳，母Lady Ursula Ann Yatesは35歳であった。約1565年にイギリスでRobert Halswellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1596年3月27日にイギリスソメルセトゴアスウルストで48歳で死去し，イギリスソメルセトゴアスウルストにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Susanna Brounker(이)가 대략 1549년 영국 윌츠히르 멜크샤에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Henry Brounker(은)는 40세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Ursula Ann Yates(은)는 35세였다. 그녀는 대략 1565년 영국에서 Robert Halswell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1596년 3월 27일 영국 서머세트 고스르스트에서 48세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 서머세트 고스르스트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Susanna Brounker nasceu aproximadamente 1549, em Melksham, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Henry Brounker, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Lady Ursula Ann Yates, tinha 35 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert Halswell aproximadamente 1565, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 27 de março de 1596, em Goathurst, Somerset, Inglaterra, com 48 anos, e foi sepultada em Goathurst, Somerset, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Susanna Brounker родилась около 1549 г. в местности мелкшам, уилцхир, Англия, её отцу по имени Henry Brounker было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Ursula Ann Yates, 35. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert Halswell около 1565 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 27 марта 1596 г. в местности гоатурст, сомирсет, Англия в возрасте 48 лет и была похоронена в местности гоатурст, сомирсет, Англия.
